# Usha Tutorials

> A trusted tuition center in Kalwa, Thane providing expert Mathematics and Science coaching for Std 3rd to 9th across CBSE, ICSE, SSC, and IB/IGCSE boards.

For over 16 years, Usha Tutorials has focused on conceptual learning, small batch sizes, and personalised attention to build strong academic foundations and improve final test results by 30% to 40%.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Main hub showcasing our teaching philosophy, family testimonials, and campus overview.
- [About Us](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Our 16-year history, holistic teaching methods, and student development goals.
- [Programs](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Detailed breakdown of syllabus-aligned coaching for CBSE, ICSE, SSC, and IB boards.
- [New Admission](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Enquiry portal and seat registration for upcoming student batches.
- [FAQ](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Answers regarding class timings (Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 8 PM), location, and testing structures.
- [Contact](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/): Quick links to phone channels, physical map tracking, and email communications.

## Secondary Channels

- [Blog](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/blog): Educational articles, study tips, and updates for parents and students.
- [Case Study](https://ushatutorials.netlify.app/casestudy): Detailed breakdowns of student academic progress and performance success metrics.

## Contact Information
- Address: Sai Vihar CHS, Parsik Nagar, Kharegaon, Near 90 Feet Road, Kalwa, Thane, Maharashtra 400605
- Phone: +91 81692 63169
- Email: ushaateacher@gmail.com
